project_info.title: Choosing the Right KYC Stack for Digzio

outline.title: Choosing the Right KYC Stack for Digzio
outline.summary: Title slide introducing the strategic comparison between Onfido and DHA + Smile Identity for Digzio's KYC stack.

outline.title: The KYC Problem Digzio Must Solve
outline.summary: Outlines the scale and requirements of verifying 10,000+ students monthly without compromising trust or burning cash.

outline.title: What Onfido Does — and What It Costs
outline.summary: Explains Onfido's OCR-based approach, its $1.50 per check cost, and limitations for the South African context.
outline.image_plan: /home/ubuntu/upload/search_images/yAs3eZAy0End.webp - Image 15 visually represents the Onfido process with document scanning and facial recognition.

outline.title: What the Two-Layer Stack Does — and What It Costs
outline.summary: Details the DHA + Smile Identity approach, direct government validation, and its blended $0.65 per check cost.
outline.image_plan: /home/ubuntu/digzio_images/06_large_unit_room.jpg - Image 6 illustrates the two-layer KYC process with DHA validation and liveness check.

outline.title: Head-to-Head Feature Comparison
outline.summary: A direct comparison table across 8 critical dimensions showing the Two-Layer Stack winning or tying on all fronts.

outline.title: The $102,000 Annual Saving — Visualised
outline.summary: Highlights the massive $102,000 annual saving at Growth stage volume with a cumulative cost comparison chart.
outline.image_plan: /home/ubuntu/digzio/docs/diagrams/digzio_cost_estimate.png - Image 13 is a bar chart showing cost comparison, directly visualizing the $102,000 annual saving.

outline.title: The Security Argument — Cheaper AND More Secure
outline.summary: Explains how bypassing OCR and directly querying the DHA eliminates the most common forged ID attack vector.
outline.image_plan: /home/ubuntu/upload/search_images/E0AI2IW6PJSw.jpg - Image 20, 'Good news as SA's digital ID system gets upgrade', directly relates to the security argument of using the DHA system.

outline.title: POPIA Compliance Advantage
outline.summary: Details how the Two-Layer Stack dramatically reduces POPIA liability by storing zero ID document images.

outline.title: Integration Architecture
outline.summary: Outlines the 7-step asynchronous API integration flow for the Two-Layer Stack.
outline.image_plan: /home/ubuntu/digzio_images/digzio_architecture.png - Image 11 is a system architecture diagram, which is relevant to the integration architecture of the two-layer stack.

outline.title: Recommendation and Decision
outline.summary: The final recommendation to adopt the Two-Layer Stack and the immediate next steps for implementation.

outline.title: Summary — The Case in One Page
outline.summary: A concise recap of the three main reasons (Cost, Security, Compliance) the Two-Layer Stack is the superior choice.
